results.title: Authorities desperately search for hiker missing in wilderness near Lake Tahoe
results.description: A 60-year-old hiker has been missing for nearly a week in the wilderness near Lake Tahoe, leading local officials to frantically search for the man.

results.title: Man charged with arson, domestic violence after three houses destroyed
results.description: The man allegedly used an accelerant to set fire to one house, which spread to two others and forced police to declare a public safety exclusion zone.

results.description: By Abdulrahman Yahaya The Super Eagles on Saturday defeated Jamaica National Football Team 3-0 in London to win their fourth Unity Cup title. Midfielder Alhassan Yusuf...

results.title: 'The Sixth Borough' screening reminds audiences of Long Island's role in hip hop history
results.description: "The vision was to give these guys the proper respect, give the region its proper respect in the founding of hip-hop's gold era," said one of the filmmakers.

results.title: Gen Z and Gen Alpha want to see caring dads and vulnerable men in movies and TV
results.description: Center for Scholars & Storytellers at UCLA study finds Gen Z and Gen Alpha want to see caring, affectionate dads and men showing vulnerability in movies and TV, rejecting outdated masculine stereotypes. Joyful fatherhood was the single most requested portrayal of masculinity by adolescents surveyed by the researchers, with nearly 60% of young people asking to see more fathers openly showing love and enjoying parenting. 46% of respondents are seeking content that shows men asking for help, including with their mental health. "For today’s young audiences, the most compelling hero isn’t the one standing alone, but the one who has...
